design_philosophy: Tactical Minimalism. Command-center focus for elite athleticism. High-visibility data layered over deep obsidian black. No soft gradients, only sharp contrast.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Control Room Grid. Dense grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4, p-6 inside dashboard widgets. Generous padding for section containers.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense content and data metrics. Center-align only major layout structural elements if symmetrical.

surface_styles.cards: Flat solid background (#141414), 1px solid border (border-white/10). No box-shadow. Sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm).
surface_styles.headers: Solid background (#0A0A0A) with hard bottom border. No glassmorphism. Fixed/sticky z-50.
surface_styles.buttons: High-saturation primary color blocks. No rounded corners. Explicit hover states.

components.charts: Use Recharts. Line and Bar charts should use #007AFF and #39FF14. Remove grid lines or make them extremely faint (opacity 0.05).
components.tables: Dense rows. Bottom border on rows (border-white/10). Hover effect on rows bg-white/5. Left-aligned data.
components.video_player: Takes up major grid space (col-span-full md:col-span-2 lg:col-span-3). Custom control bar with solid backgrounds.
components.annotation_toolbar: Floating or docked toolbar with sharp edges, neon active states when a tool (pen/arrow/note) is selected.

interactions.hover: Explicit text and bg color changes. E.g. hover:bg-[#1F1F1F] hover:text-white.
interactions.testing: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g. data-testid="upload-video-btn", data-testid="player-stat-card").

media.description: Empty soccer stadium at dusk with lights on. Use for login/onboarding background with heavy dark overlay (bg-black/80).
Player portrait for analytics dashboard and roster views.
Abstract neon lines for tactical formation background or AI processing state overlay.
Team crest / logo for header and match library cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Control Room' grid for the dashboard. It must be dense.
Ensure the layout is highly contrasted. Backgrounds are deep obsidian (#0A0A0A), surfaces are dark charcoal (#141414).
Use Bebas Neue for all H1, H2, H3 elements and keep them uppercase and tightly tracked.
Do NOT use 'Card' components from Shadcn if they have soft shadows or large border radii. Customize Shadcn to have rounded-none or rounded-sm, 1px solid border-white/10, and no shadows.
For the manual annotation tools, create a dedicated tool palette UI with high-contrast active states.
Add 'data-testid' to every button, link, form input, and interactive widget.
